---
title: "RSH7033 – Applied Multivariate Statistics"
subtitle: "Week 4: Multivariate Regression and Generalized Linear Models."
author: "Dr. Gonsalge Almeida – Trine University."
output: html_document
---

# Introduction

This lab demonstrates how **generalized linear models (GLMs)** can be used to analyze multivariate environmental data.

We will examine environmental factors associated with the **presence or absence of the Southern Corroboree frog**, a critically endangered species.

Learning objectives:

- Fit logistic regression models
- Evaluate multicollinearity
- Perform model selection
- Conduct model diagnostics
- Interpret results

---

# Load Required Packages
```{r}
library(DAAG)
library(car)
library(MuMIn)
library(glmnet)
library(statmod)
library(faraway)
library(shrink)
